name: Judah's Friend Group
description:
What better way to get to know new people than being stuck on a road trip with them for a week and change? haha!!!

(Soft sequel to my Roberts Family and Black Bear Cross bots, it's implied that you know and are on food terms with Judah and Leon. Reupload with a new scenario cause I didn't care for the old one. Blacked out text is everyones names so this bot shows up if they're looked up lol)

Feedback appreciated just don't be a dickhead
